<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
The full context is now clear.

Three updates need to go into the documentation between phases 4 and 5.

- Document preview and download functionality, including the storage read method, handler, endpoint, and UI components.
- A two-column case detail layout with a sticky document panel on the right.
- Case list progress now shows three checklist icons instead of just identity.

This mirrors the cross-cutting improvement pattern used in Phase 2.1.
</details></think>

Documentation is updated for the work between Phase 4 and Phase 5, following the same **Phase 4.1** pattern as Phase 2.1.

### New documents
- **`docs/phases/phase-4.1-document-preview-case-ux.md`** — full delivery notes: problem statement, deliverables, API route, UI behaviour, demo walkthrough
- **`docs/features/registration/download-document.md`** — slice doc for `DownloadDocument` with flow diagram and call chain

### Updated documents
| File | What changed |
|------|----------------|
| `docs/phases/README.md` | Phase 4.1 row added (Complete) |
| `docs/ROADMAP.md` | Progress table + new Phase 4.1 section |
| `docs/APP-OVERVIEW.md` | Bumped to Phase 4.1; progress column + document panel section |
| `docs/features/registration/attach-document.md` | Panel layout, preview/download cross-link |
| `docs/features/registration/list-registration-cases.md` | Extended DTO + `RegistrationCaseChecklistProgress` |
| `docs/features/registration/remove-document.md` | Blazor entry via document panel |
| `docs/features/registration/README.md` | Download slice linked |
| `docs/design-system/05-ui-kit.md` | Note on interim `RegistrationCaseDocumentPanel` |
| `docs/design-system/06-page-templates.md` | Case detail two-column layout; document viewer marked partial at 4.1 |
| `docs/phases/phase-4-address-household.md` | Link to Phase 4.1 |

### Captured in the docs
1. **`DownloadDocument`** — `OpenReadAsync`, streaming endpoint, PDF/image preview
2. **Case detail UX** — sticky right panel (`RegistrationCaseDocumentPanel`), fullscreen dialog, two-column layout
3. **Case list UX** — `RegistrationCaseChecklistProgress` showing `n/3` for identity, legal residence, and address
